title: New Tool for Sculpting Single Photons
body: APS Physics highlights work on adjusting the frequency and bandwidth of single photons inside an optical fiber.

title: Frédéric Bouchard receives the 2025 SPIE Early Career Achievement Award
body: SPIE recognized work on temporal encoding and ultrafast temporal interferometric networks.

title: Kate Fenwick
body: Profile of Kate Fenwick and her work in ultrafast photonics for quantum computing.

title: Researchers devise new quantum photonics technique to create better holograms
body: News story on intensity interferometry for holography with quantum and classical light.

title: Light detectors illuminate the future of quantum sensing
body: Story on detector technology and its role in future quantum sensing systems.

title: New quantum key protocol brings ultra-secure quantum communications one step closer
body: Story on a quantum key protocol for secure quantum communications.
